---
title: "Exercise 7: Machine learning II"
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
- Implement and evaluate k-nearest neighbors, decision trees, and neural networks for a business prediction task.
- Compare models with respect to accuracy, interpretability, and practical implications.
- Recommend a suitable model for deployment.
:::

::: callout-note
TODO
:::

## Exam prep

TODO : include specific questions/tasks that could be included in the exam.
